news.title: Why Is 3M (MMM) Stock Soaring Today
news.summary: Shares of industrial conglomerate 3M (NYSE: MMM) jumped 6.1% in the pre-market session after the company reported second-quarter results that beat Wall Street expectations and raised its full-year profit forecast.
